feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How do I post goods receipt with reference to a sales order?
entry.content:
Hi I have customer scenario, 

Presently no ERP with customer so they build their own software and using it

Scenario: Customer receive material with reference to sales order and service in their own service center and deliver back to customer and raise invoice 

How do we can do the receive material with ref to sales order in sap public cloud? We have tried Post Good Receipt with order reference(This process required us to choose the supplier mandatorily) but we want to link either customer (or) sales order, Is there any specific movement we can use to achieve this scenario except 501?

Regards

Janarthanan

entry.title: Sales Flow - Trading Company buy and sell same PO twice to 2 different customers/Sold Tos
entry.content:
Experts, I have a scenario where External customer PO is fulfilled thru 

1. Buy from Plant and sell to internal customer

2. Buy from internal customer and sell it to external customer

What is the best practice to implement this scenario

entry.title: Extract Customer Master record from SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there a method to retrieve the customer ID using either the customer's telephone number or their name in ECC?

entry.title: Delivery Line Item Deletion Validation in VL02N
entry.content:
Hi,

I have used the user exit (MV50AFZ1) for VL02N line item deletion validation. When I delete the line item and save, it throws an error. It works fine, but when I press back, a duplicate line item comes up. please help.

entry.title: How to make configurations for new button of SAP note 3210908
entry.content:
Hi There,

We have applied SAP Note "3210908 - Outbound NF-e: Enable 'Display PDF' button in J1BNFE monitor for SAP S/4HANA releases", for our customer in their S/4HANA system.

The new button comes with defaut service and form names in the code to be displayed, but we need to make configurations to display the current used smartform for the DANFE document of the customer.
I found no documentation explaining how to make configurations to use another form then the default one. 
I tryed to manage the output in the Output Management (found in SPRO), changing the application type configuration to use NAST settings, but it didn't work. 

Is there a way to display smartforms using this button or at least disable it?

@luize_boyen @Felipe_Silveira SAP S/4HANA SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: SAP SOP Transfer plan from SIS
entry.content:
Hi 

I would like to clarify some thing regarding to SAP SOP (Sales and Operations planning).

I need to create plan, based on historical data of sold products. I can get this from table LIPS for deliveries with movement type 601.

Desired process is to run MC87 > Edit > Create sales plan > Transfer plan from SIS.

--------------------------------

So I created SIS structure withing following steps:

MC21 Create Self-Defined Information Structure
SPRO>Logistics - General>LIS>Logistics Data Warehouse>Updating>Updating Definition>General Definition Using Update Groups>Maintain Update Groups Update group -
SPRO>Logistics - General>Logistics Data Warehouse>Updating>Updating Definition>Specific definition using Update Rules>Maintain Update Rules>Display
MC24 Create update rule
OVRA Maintain Statistics Groups for Customers
OVRF Maintain Statistics Groups for Material
SPRO>Logistics - General>Logistics Data Warehouse>Updating>Updating Control>Settings: Sales>Statistics Groups>Maintain Statistics Groups for Sales Documents
SPRO>Logistics - General>Logistics Data Warehouse>Updating>Updating Control>Settings: Sales>Statistics Groups>Assign Statistics Groups for each Delivery Item Type
OMO1 Activate SIS Update
-------------------------------------
Questions are:
1. How to fill new SIS by old data?
2. When we create new deliveries and goods issue, should be new SIS table updated automatically. Or should we update it via  custom program or something else?

entry.title: gross weight scale VK11
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I need to set up a price scale based on gross weight in VK11. Imagine that we need to set the shipping fees for sending product by DHL so:

1 KG --> 20 EUR

1,5 KG --> 22 EUR

2 KG --> 24 EUR

And so on.

I'd appreciate any idea or solution. Because I tried but it doesn't work.

Thanks 

Angie C

entry.title: PO item, Order( internal order) fields are missing in S4 HAna system in SO line items
entry.content:
Hi All

Hi All

We are implementing SAP S4 Hana for one my clients. in ECC system in sales order line item PO item, Internal order fields exists but in S4 Hana system these fields do not exists in line items shown below.

is this standard S4 Hana behavior or I am missing anything here? Client is asking the same two fields in S4 Hana system.

the small screen shot is sss 803 is S4 hana system and ID1 800 is the ECC system

Thanks

entry.title: Can we achieve delivery related billing in Customer advance invoice process using Billing plan
entry.content:
Hi All

We implemented Customer invoice invoice process using Billing plan. It is working fine when full delivery takes place where as when partial delivery takes place the billing qty is copying from Sales Order where they need the billed qty equal lent to delivered qty. 

Process steps:

1. VA01- with billing plan

2. VF01- FAZ - down payment request

3. F-29- Post the down payment

4. Vl01N- Delivery

5. SD final invoice (F2)

There is no issue when single delivery and single invoice because when they are creating invoice system copies the order qty i.e. 10.

where as when partial delivery takes place they create partial invoice in this case also system is copying the full order qty i.e. 10 which is incorrect as the partial delivery qty is 4 out of order qty 10.

next time when remaining delivery qty i.e. 6 is delivered user creates invoice for the 3rd billing plan and system is copying the full order qty i.e. 10. However in both the cases the net value is perfectly fine as it is copying the respective billing plan amount into Billing document.

you can see the partial invoice for 4 delivery qty but in invoice qty = 10

and final delivery is for 6 qty but invoice qty copyiing it from SO 10 qty  However net value is ok.

 

So Business requirement is system should allow to create invoice with ref to delivery so correct delivery qty is copied or at least system should allow to change the invoice qty manually while creating so they can modify the invoice qty according to delivery qty.

Other Information:

Since the billing plan is maintained system does not allow the billing relavance other than I

I searched in Google, found some helpful links but that did not help me to resolve my requirement.

Thanks

entry.title: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
Dear SD Expert

When I am going to do PGI then I want to do a batch search before that I checked the batch quantity in MMBE and found that there is a quantity in only 1 batch of 10,000 QTY. but while doing PGI all the batches of that material are created in all the batch searches showing PGI Transaction.

I require that while doing PGI only batch search is done. Only the stock batch will show and the batch that does not have stock will not show in the PGi search.

MMBE

VL01N

Thanks 

M.G Rabbani

entry.title: userexit_check_vbap process twice
entry.content:
Hi All,

I hope when user press Enter, then check some condition.

I wrote logic in userexit_check_vbap, when I debug code, it's process the logic twice.

How can I do that it trigger only one time

Please Help, Thanks all!

entry.title: missing icon in VA05
entry.content:
Hi.

I have problem with missing icon in VA05.

"Display Variants" is not visible on production but available on test system.

The functionality is there (i can click the empty space on toolbar or use shortcut).

The same problem for all visual themes..

Parametr SD_VARIANT_MAINTAIN -> OK.

Regards,

Piotr

entry.title: Serial Number Profile and Incompletion log
entry.content:
Hi dear community,

 

I have a question regarding Serial Number Profile & Incompleteness.

In TCODE OIS2 we define serial number profiles & assign procedures to those profiles. One of this procedures is "SDCC" "Completness check for delivery". If the Usage is set to 03 (obligatory) I would expect that we can setup a corresponding completeness check in SD / LE.

Now in TCODE OVA2 we can customize the incompleteness procedure. I would expect Table = V50UC, fieldname SERIAL to activate the incompleteness check.

Unfortunately my expectations do not match the system behaviour 😕  So I checked the incompleteness routine (SAPFV50U) v50uc_check_serial. This one only checks for SDLS and SDRE. It does not care about SDCC at all 😞 

 

Now my question: 

--> How is SDCC supposed to be working? I would like to enable / disable the check according to delivery type or similar.

--> What is the difference between SDCC and SDLS? in T377X I see the very same check routine "SERIAL_LISTE_LS". I also see the very same system behaviour. 

--> The requirement of the Business is to make the serial number entry obligatory only in case of dedicated (outbound) delivery (item) types. Is there some other way I am missing?

(The check in (SAPFV50U) v50uc_check_serial (via "SERIAL_LISTE_LS") is also executed during PGR. So I am even not able to deactivate the check for inbound deliveries.)

Thanks & lot in advance & Best,

entry.title: SAP SD Pricing Access Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am currently working on updating the SD Pricing Access Sequence and would like to make sure we have considered all aspects during development and testing so current operations will not be jeopardized.

I would appreciate it if you can share your thoughts on what should be considered, including the risks and other factors involved.

Thank you.

Jodie Feliz Racho

entry.title: Re: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
@mdgolamrabbani 

Please check and share your Batch Determination setup. It should be based on your settings.

entry.title: In OPD transaction, I'm trying to find the email recipient table in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm inside the window when we open the transaction OPD and I'd like to find the tables that contains the email recipient list.

I see the table RES_T_DEC_TAB_EMAIL_RECEIVER_1 in OPD but I'm unable to find it in SAP S4

My goal is to schedule an extraction from this table.

Is there a way to find the tables inside S4 or its stored somewhere else ?

See screencaptures for more infos.

 ---Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Open OPD transaction
  2. Select Sales Document and Determination Step: Email Recipient
  3. Try to find the table where this data is stored

Thanks!

entry.title: How to transfer Sales order stock from one plant to another plant of different company code
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement.

I have sales order stock at plant A which is created from production order for MTO scenario. I need to transfer the sales order stock from plant A to plant B of different company codes.

How can I transfer the sales order stock via Intercompany STO. 

IC STO configuration is done b/w plant A and plant B. But how to transfer the sales order stock.

Please note: I can not convert the stock to unrestricted. That has to be transferred in sales order stock only.

SD (Sales and Distribution) MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: Problem of copying text from service order to billing document item level texts
entry.content: We encountered an issue when displaying the invoice form from a service order. The problem is as follows: after making a text note at the item and header level of the service order, this note (message) cannot be transferred to the invoice. Since it doesn’t carry over, we are unable to display it on the invoice form. Has anyone faced a similar issue, and what would you suggest as a solution? Thank you.

entry.title: How can i assign condition unit "points" to condition type at sales pricing procedure ?
entry.content: We need to create new condition type at sales pricing procedure for points (Loyalty system). So, how to assign new condition unit "points" to condition type ?

entry.title: Advanced Intercompany Sales - VCM
entry.content: Can anyone tell me why the billing document still pending, and supplier invoice is partially processed while all invoices are created successfully and posted.
